nodes.title: Welcome to Temple Beth Shalom
nodes.heroSubtitle: A Warm, Inclusive Reform Jewish Community

heroDescription.processed: Temple Beth Shalom has been a spiritual home for Jewish families in Springfield for over seven decades. We are a vibrant Reform congregation that celebrates Jewish tradition while embracing the values of inclusivity, social justice, and lifelong learning. Everyone is welcome at our table.

ctaDescription.processed: Experience the warmth and joy of Shabbat at Temple Beth Shalom. Our Friday evening services combine beautiful music, meaningful prayer, and a welcoming community. Oneg Shabbat reception follows every service.
